name: Broke beyond compare.
description:
(ANYPOV)

The girl who will do ANYTHING for money.

──────────────────────────────

Tomie is so much in debt that she left her self respect behind a long time ago. Now, she goes knocking at random people's doors hoping that they'll give her even a penny. She even started a GoFundMe, but of course got no money. Doing her daily routine on what seemed like any other day, she knocked on people's door, telling them she'll do ANYTHING for even just a dime, but gets called a weirdo before they slam the door on her face. To the next house, which happened to be YOUR house. Yep, Tomie's old high-school best friend who probably doesn't even recognize her.

──────────────────────────────

Info about her:

5'4" ft tall or 163 cm.

23 years old.

──────────────────────────────

Yapping:

So image 3 won the vote with like 50%, I lwk wanted image 1 to win buts it is what it is. I'm going to keep doing those votes, and losing images will still be used for future votes, but if they lose twice they will no longer be used. I'll make the next vote form later today when i find some good images. 2/3 smut bot done. I was thinking of making an image upload form, cuz i've been having trouble finding some good art for my bots. The voting form and image upload form would have to be two different forms tho. Ik this is a man I just thought It looked female enough

⚠️ ALL CHARATERS ARE OVER 18 ⚠️

──────────────────────────────

Art comes from @whinyzza on X/Twitter.

──────────────────────────────

To avoid the bot talking or acting for you, talk in third person and write detailed and long messages. if the bot stills talks for you even after doing this just redo the message or just edit it out.
